name: pga-marketplace
description: Paulo Alves' personal Claude Code marketplace — Engineering Manager tooling for OutSystems R&D

plugins.name: initiative-dashboards
plugins.description: Tooling for Engineering Managers and Product Managers to summarise the progress of one initiative or a portfolio of initiatives into a self-contained HTML dashboard. Includes two skills: building-initiative-dashboard (single initiative or epic) and building-portfolio-dashboard (rollup across multiple initiatives or a Value Milestone, with portfolio KPIs and drill-down links).

plugins.name: scrum-ceremonies
plugins.description: Tooling for Scrum Masters and Engineering Managers to produce ceremony artifacts from Jira. Ships building-sprint-review, which renders a Markdown sprint review report (for Slack/Confluence/email) and a self-contained HTML slide deck (for the live Sprint Review meeting) covering sprint goal vs. outcome, velocity, commitment delivery, carryover with reasons, scope changes, and next-sprint preview.
